function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox task yet: House Mesh has a canonical project record, but I could not find a canonical project record for BlueMesa Quotebook in `40_projects/`, so I can’t compare both start dates or decide which one to delete without guessing. Please confirm the BlueMesa Quotebook project path/name (or create its project folder) and I can finish.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS on entering folders, used process-next-inbox workflow, and did not mutate workspace because request lacked canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: `40_projects/AGENTS.MD` defines canonical project identity via project folder + `README.MD`. House Mesh canonical record exists at `40_projects/2026_03_26_house_mesh/README.MD` (start date derivable from folder prefix). Repeated discovery in `40_projects` (`find` for BlueMesa/Quotebook and content search for both terms) returned no canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project, so the required two-project date comparison and deletion target are indeterminate.
